She is also the wife of Udhayanidhi Stalin, the former deputy chief minister of Tamil Nadu.","extract_html":"

Kiruthiga Udhayanidhi is an Indian film director working in Tamil cinema. She is also the wife of Udhayanidhi Stalin, the former deputy chief minister of Tamil Nadu.

"}
